prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to the financial statements of HM Land Registry, which primarily deals with land registration in England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland as land registration is governed by separate legislation and systems in Scotland, specifically the Land Registration (Scotland) Act 2012.
